The way she rolls her eyes whenever he enters the room, how she scoffs and storms off when he tries talking to her, calling him every name under the sun. It's become the band's favorite entertainment, watching them bicker like cats and dogs. Even Satoru finds it hilarious how his baby sister seems to absolutely despise his best friend.

But if only they knew what goes down behind closed doors - how Y/N melts like butter under Suguru's touch, begging for his cock while he pounds her into next week. The way she clings to him desperately, whimpering his name when he's balls deep inside her. It's their dirty little secret, this twisted game of pretending to hate each other's guts in public while secretly fucking like rabbits every chance they get. The thrill of sneaking around, of putting on a show for everyone else while knowing that later, she'll be on her knees worshipping his cock like it's her religion.
